messages.content:
Place shard seed centers in a normalized 2D world.
Coordinates are in [0,1]x[0,1]. The world aspect ratio is width/height.

INPUT_JSON:{"aspect_ratio":0.5,"k":4,"hotspots":[{"x":0.49979017951514093,"y":0.1977547587960342,"weight":0.7218544561063892,"radius":0.022799392112736093},{"x":0.5925470594301766,"y":0.8405607123121491,"weight":0.22662118294351066,"radius":0.04954131517732939},{"x":0.486671838595214,"y":0.7935249105994917,"weight":0.05152436095010004,"radius":0.033739446265033585}]}

Return ONLY JSON matching this schema:
{"centers":[{"x":0.0,"y":0.0}, ... ]}

Rules:
- Return exactly 4 centers
- All x,y within [0,1]
- Put more centers near heavier hotspots (higher weight)
- Hard constraint: no two centers may be closer than 0.07
- Hard constraint: for each of the top 2 hotspots by weight, at least one center must be within 0.12
- Return ONLY JSON (no extra text)
